_comment: Warlord (Kassiy the Iron) - NPC dialogues and general strings
dialogue-warlord-intro: You stand before Kassiy the Iron. I remember every warrior who set foot in the arena. Some with honor, some with shame.
dialogue-warlord-whoareyou-answer: I am Kassiy the Iron. Once I marched into battle myself, broke spears against enemy shields. Now I judge the arena. Those who pass my trials become legends. The rest are dust in the wind.
dialogue-warlord-aboutarena-answer: The arena is not just a place for combat. It is a trial of spirit, strength, and mastery. Legends are forged here, and the weak are broken. Every warrior who steps on these stones writes their own story. The question is — will it be worthy?
dialogue-warlord-leaderboard-confirm: Here are the names of the greatest arena warriors:
dialogue-warlord-reputation-confirm: Let's see what you're worth in the arena:
dialogue-warlord-repair-info: Good weapons deserve care. Bring me rusty gears and I'll restore your blade's edge. Hold the item in your right hand and choose what to repair.
dialogue-warlord-repair-cantafford-answe: No gears, no repair. Come back when you find some.
dialogue-warlord-repair-nothing: Hold a damaged item in your right hand. I can't repair thin air.
dialogue-warlord-repair-working: Let me take a look... Good steel. I'll fix it up.
dialogue-warlord-repair-working-full: Serious work. Hold on — I'll make it good as new.
dialogue-warlord-repair-done: Done. It'll serve you well. Take care of your gear — it takes care of you.
dialogue-warlord-repair-done-full: Fresh off the anvil. Full repair — not a scratch left.
no-quest-available-warlord: Reputation grows in battle. Win in the arena — and I'll remember it.
